Tom Gallagher

Chief Financial Officer

Analytical and commercially sharp Risk-aware but pragmatic Transparent about financial realities Conservative with capital allocation Systems-focused

Areas of Expertise

  • Mining project financial modelling
  • ASX reporting and compliance
  • Capital raising and investor relations
  • Iron ore and lithium commodity markets
  • Cash flow management and forecasting
  • Cost control and profitability analysis
  • Financial due diligence and audit
  • Budget management and variance analysis

For Other Topics

  • Operations: speak with Karen Whitfield
  • Environment: speak with Dr. Ravi Mehta
  • Safety: speak with Brooke Lawson

Schedule an Interview

You need to book an appointment before speaking with Tom Gallagher.
